name: Pecan Rolls
recipeIngredient: 3 tsp Icing sugar or finely Granulated sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add the icing sugar and granulated sugar, stirring constantly.
3. Add the vanilla and stir until combined.
4. Gradually add the flour and crushed pecans, mixing until a loose, crumbly dough forms that holds together when pressed.
5. Shape small nuggets of dough into logs, approximately 2 inches long and 1/2 inch in diameter.
6. Bake at 325°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Roll the logs in icing sugar while still hot.
